					<h1 class="content-title"><em>Wicked For Good</em>, <em>One Battle After Another</em>, <em> Frankenstein</em> Named Top Films of 2025 by AFI</h1>
					<h2 class="content-subtitle">The American Film Institute announced its official selections of the top ten movies and TV shows of 2025.</h2>
					<p class="post-meta">
						by
													<!-- Co-Authors Plus plug-in compatible -->
																						<a href="https://editorial.rottentomatoes.com/author/jacqueline-coley/">
									Jacqueline Coley								</a>
																											| December 4, 2025					</p>

					<hr>

											<p class="tags">
							TAGGED AS: <a href="https://editorial.rottentomatoes.com/tag/academy-awards/" rel="tag">Academy Awards</a>, <a href="https://editorial.rottentomatoes.com/tag/afi/" rel="tag">AFI</a>, <a href="https://editorial.rottentomatoes.com/tag/awards/" rel="tag">Awards</a>, <a href="https://editorial.rottentomatoes.com/tag/emmys/" rel="tag">Emmys</a>, <a href="https://editorial.rottentomatoes.com/tag/oscars/" rel="tag">Oscars</a>, <a href="https://editorial.rottentomatoes.com/tag/streaming/" rel="tag">streaming</a>, <a href="https://editorial.rottentomatoes.com/tag/tv/" rel="tag">TV</a>						</p>
					
					<div class="content-body">
						
<p>The American Film Institute (AFI) announced its official selections of the top 10 movies and TV shows of 2025 today, and the best picture race has come into sharper focus, with <em>Wicked For Good</em>, <em>One Battle After Another</em>, and <em>Frankenstein</em> all earning the top film distinction by the film conservatory. On the TV Side, Emmy Favorites <em>The Pitt</em>, <em>Severance</em>, and <em>The Studio</em> earned recognition.</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Recommended: <a href="https://editorial.rottentomatoes.com/article/2025-2026-awards-calendar/">2025-2026 Awards Calendar</a></strong></li>



<li><strong>Recommended: <a href="https://editorial.rottentomatoes.com/article/2026-spirit-awards-nominations-full-list-of-nominees/">2026 Spirit Awards Nominations: Full List of Nominees</a></strong></li>



<li></li>
</ul>



<p>Netflix, Universal Pictures/Focus Features, and Searchlight were the big winners on the film side, taking home two prizes each. With an equal mix of blockbusters and indie fare, most moviegoers would likely be pleased if this list translated to the Best Picture lineup. Last year, <em>Oppenheimer</em> was honored just days before it took home the top film prize, while <em>Shōgun</em> and <em>Hacks</em> were dubbed two of the best shows of 2024 by AFI before their respective Emmy wins this September.</p>



<p><strong>Read below for the full list of AFI winners, and if you’re as obsessed with awards as we are, check out our <a href="https://editorial.rottentomatoes.com/article/awards-leaderboard-best-movies-of-2024/">Awards Leaderboard for 2024</a></strong><strong><a href="https://editorial.rottentomatoes.com/article/awards-leaderboard-best-movies-of-2024/">/2025</a>.</strong></p>

gold_text: Wicked For Good , One Battle After Another , Frankenstein Named Top Films of 2025 by AFI The American Film Institute announced its official selections of the top ten movies and TV shows of 2025. by Jacqueline Coley | December 4, 2025 TAGGED AS: Academy Awards , AFI , Awards , Emmys , Oscars , streaming , TV The American Film Institute (AFI) announced its official selections of the top 10 movies and TV shows of 2025 today, and the best picture race has come into sharper focus, with Wicked For Good , One Battle After Another , and Frankenstein all earning the top film distinction by the film conservatory. On the TV Side, Emmy Favorites The Pitt , Severance , and The Studio earned recognition. Recommended: 2025-2026 Awards Calendar Recommended: 2026 Spirit Awards Nominations: Full List of Nominees Netflix, Universal Pictures/Focus Features, and Searchlight were the big winners on the film side, taking home two prizes each. With an equal mix of blockbusters and indie fare, most moviegoers would likely be pleased if this list translated to the Best Picture lineup. Last year, Oppenheimer was honored just days before it took home the top film prize, while Shōgun and Hacks were dubbed two of the best shows of 2024 by AFI before their respective Emmy wins this September. Read below for the full list of AFI winners, and if you’re as obsessed with awards as we are, check out our Awards Leaderboard for 2024 /2025 . Top 10 Movies Avatar: Fire and Ash Bugonia Frankenstein Wicked: For Good Jay Kelly Marty Supreme One Battle After Another Sinners Train Dreams Top 10 TV Shows Adolescence Andor Death by Lightning The Diplomat The Lowdown The Pitt Pluribus Severance The Studio Task SPECIAL RECOGNITION It Was Just An Accident Thumbnail image by Universal Pictures On an Apple device? Follow Rotten Tomatoes on Apple News .
